rationale: The cited paper appears potentially substantive because it studies U.S. pharmaceutical DTP/DTC marketing dynamics after launch and finds effects are strongest/persistent early in the life cycle, which closely matches the citing paper’s core focus on early postapproval advertising response and effectiveness. Given this strong construct/context overlap (early-stage pharma marketing effectiveness) and a direct DOI match, this is not clearly an incidental mention and should be reviewed in full.
